name: CashControl Day Book
report_script:
filters = filters or {}
view = filters.get("view") or "Statement"
acct = filters.get("account")
date = filters.get("date") or frappe.utils.nowdate()

cols_statement = [
    {"label": "Particulars", "fieldname": "particulars", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 320},
    {"label": "Count", "fieldname": "count", "fieldtype": "Int", "width": 70},
    {"label": "Cash In", "fieldname": "cash_in", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 125},
    {"label": "Cash Out", "fieldname": "cash_out", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 125},
    {"label": "Credit", "fieldname": "credit", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 125},
    {"label": "Ref Type", "fieldname": "ref_type", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 115},
    {"label": "Reference", "fieldname": "reference", "fieldtype": "Dynamic Link", "options": "ref_type", "width": 170},
]
cols_detail = [
    {"label": "Entered At", "fieldname": "entered_at", "fieldtype": "Datetime", "width": 155},
    {"label": "Type", "fieldname": "voucher_type", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 115},
    {"label": "Voucher", "fieldname": "voucher_no", "fieldtype": "Dynamic Link", "options": "voucher_type", "width": 180},
    {"label": "Category", "fieldname": "category", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 140},
    {"label": "Cash In", "fieldname": "cash_in", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 110},
    {"label": "Cash Out", "fieldname": "cash_out", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 110},
    {"label": "Balance", "fieldname": "balance", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 120},
    {"label": "Remarks", "fieldname": "row_remarks", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 320},
]
cols_credit = [
    {"label": "Invoice", "fieldname": "invoice", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Sales Invoice", "width": 180},
    {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 200},
    {"label": "POS Profile", "fieldname": "pos_profile", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 110},
    {"label": "Billed", "fieldname": "billed", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 120},
    {"label": "Cash Collected", "fieldname": "collected", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 130},
    {"label": "Outstanding", "fieldname": "outstanding", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 130},
]

cols = cols_statement
rows = []
message = ""

if acct:
    comp = frappe.db.get_value("Account", acct, "company")

    cuvs = frappe.get_all("Cash Update Voucher",
        filters={"cash_account": acct, "posting_date": date, "docstatus": 1},
        fields=["name", "journal_entry", "counted_total", "book_balance",
                "difference", "variance_type"], order_by="creation")
    cuv_by_je = {}
    for c in cuvs:
        if c.journal_entry:
            cuv_by_je[c.journal_entry] = c.name

    gl = frappe.db.sql(
        "select posting_date, creation, voucher_type, voucher_no, debit, credit, remarks from `tabGL Entry` where account = %s and company = %s and is_cancelled = 0 and posting_date = %s order by creation",
        (acct, comp, date), as_dict=1)

    bfq = frappe.db.sql(
        "select ifnull(sum(debit)-sum(credit),0) from `tabGL Entry` where account = %s and company = %s and is_cancelled = 0 and posting_date < %s",
        (acct, comp, date))
    bf = frappe.utils.flt(bfq[0][0], 2)

    je_all = []
    for g in gl:
        if g.voucher_type == "Journal Entry" and g.voucher_no not in cuv_by_je:
            if g.voucher_no not in je_all:
                je_all.append(g.voucher_no)
    transfer_jes = {}
    if je_all:
        legs = frappe.db.sql(
            "select jea.parent as je, a.name as acc, a.account_type as atype, a.parent_account as pacc from `tabJournal Entry Account` jea join `tabAccount` a on a.name = jea.account where jea.parent in %s",
            (tuple(je_all),), as_dict=1)
        for l in legs:
            if l.acc != acct and (l.atype in ("Cash", "Bank") or l.pacc in ("Cash In Hand - VAC", "Cash-in-hand - VAC")):
                transfer_jes[l.je] = 1

    sums = {"Cash Sale": 0.0, "Customer Receipt": 0.0, "Other Cash In": 0.0,
            "Expense": 0.0, "Sale Return": 0.0, "Party Payment": 0.0,
            "Other Cash Out": 0.0, "Tally Adjustment": 0.0,
            "Transfer In": 0.0, "Transfer Out": 0.0}
    children = {"Cash Sale": [], "Customer Receipt": [], "Other Cash In": [],
                "Expense": [], "Sale Return": [], "Party Payment": [],
                "Other Cash Out": [], "Transfer In": [], "Transfer Out": []}
    detail = []
    bal = bf
    for g in gl:
        d = frappe.utils.flt(g.debit)
        c = frappe.utils.flt(g.credit)
        if g.voucher_no in cuv_by_je:
            cat = "Tally Adjustment"
        elif g.voucher_type == "Sales Invoice":
            cat = "Cash Sale" if d > 0 else "Sale Return"
        elif g.voucher_type == "Payment Entry":
            cat = "Customer Receipt" if d > 0 else "Party Payment"
        elif g.voucher_type == "Journal Entry" and g.voucher_no in transfer_jes:
            cat = "Transfer In" if d > 0 else "Transfer Out"
        elif g.voucher_type == "Journal Entry":
            cat = "Other Cash In" if d > 0 else "Expense"
        else:
            cat = "Other Cash In" if d > 0 else "Other Cash Out"
        if cat == "Tally Adjustment":
            sums[cat] = sums[cat] + d - c
        else:
            sums[cat] = sums[cat] + (d if d > 0 else c)
        if cat in children:
            children[cat].append({"voucher_no": g.voucher_no,
                                  "voucher_type": g.voucher_type,
                                  "amount": d if d > 0 else c,
                                  "remarks": g.remarks or ""})
        bal = frappe.utils.flt(bal + d - c, 2)
        detail.append({"entered_at": g.creation, "voucher_type": g.voucher_type,
                       "voucher_no": g.voucher_no, "category": cat,
                       "cash_in": d, "cash_out": c, "balance": bal,
                       "row_remarks": g.remarks})

    si_names = []
    for chd in children["Cash Sale"]:
        si_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Sale Return"]:
        si_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    si_cust = {}
    if si_names:
        res = frappe.db.sql("select name, customer from `tabSales Invoice` where name in %s",
                            (tuple(si_names),), as_dict=1)
        for x in res:
            si_cust[x.name] = x.customer

    pe_names = []
    for chd in children["Customer Receipt"]:
        pe_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Party Payment"]:
        pe_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    pe_party = {}
    if pe_names:
        res = frappe.db.sql("select name, party from `tabPayment Entry` where name in %s",
                            (tuple(pe_names),), as_dict=1)
        for x in res:
            pe_party[x.name] = x.party

    je_names = []
    for chd in children["Expense"]:
        if chd["voucher_type"] == "Journal Entry":
            je_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Other Cash In"]:
        if chd["voucher_type"] == "Journal Entry":
            je_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Other Cash Out"]:
        if chd["voucher_type"] == "Journal Entry":
            je_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Transfer In"]:
        je_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    for chd in children["Transfer Out"]:
        je_names.append(chd["voucher_no"])
    je_remark = {}
    if je_names:
        res = frappe.db.sql("select name, user_remark from `tabJournal Entry` where name in %s",
                            (tuple(je_names),), as_dict=1)
        for x in res:
            je_remark[x.name] = x.user_remark or ""

    prof_rows = frappe.db.sql(
        "select pm.parent as prof, mpa.default_account as acc from `tabPOS Payment Method` pm join `tabMode of Payment Account` mpa on mpa.parent = pm.mode_of_payment where pm.`default` = 1 and pm.parenttype = 'POS Profile' and mpa.company = %s",
        (comp,), as_dict=1)
    my_profiles = []
    for pr in prof_rows:
        if pr.acc == acct:
            my_profiles.append(pr.prof)

    sis = frappe.db.sql(
        "select name, customer, pos_profile, base_grand_total, base_rounded_total, paid_amount, outstanding_amount from `tabSales Invoice` where company = %s and docstatus = 1 and posting_date = %s and outstanding_amount > 0.005 order by creation",
        (comp, date), as_dict=1)
    credit_mine = []
    credit_unattributed = []
    for s in sis:
        if s.pos_profile and s.pos_profile in my_profiles:
            credit_mine.append(s)
        elif not s.pos_profile:
            credit_unattributed.append(s)

    message = "CashControl Day Book | %s | %s | brought forward %s | closing %s" % (
        acct, date, bf, bal)

    if view == "Voucher Detail":
        cols = cols_detail
        rows = detail
    elif view == "Credit & Partial":
        cols = cols_credit
        for s in credit_mine:
            rows.append({"invoice": s.name, "customer": s.customer,
                         "pos_profile": s.pos_profile,
                         "billed": frappe.utils.flt(s.base_rounded_total) or frappe.utils.flt(s.base_grand_total),
                         "collected": frappe.utils.flt(s.paid_amount),
                         "outstanding": frappe.utils.flt(s.outstanding_amount)})
        for s in credit_unattributed:
            rows.append({"invoice": s.name, "customer": s.customer,
                         "pos_profile": "(none)",
                         "billed": frappe.utils.flt(s.base_rounded_total) or frappe.utils.flt(s.base_grand_total),
                         "collected": frappe.utils.flt(s.paid_amount),
                         "outstanding": frappe.utils.flt(s.outstanding_amount)})
    else:
        cols = cols_statement

        si_info = {}
        order = []
        if my_profiles:
            csis = frappe.db.sql(
                "select name, customer, outstanding_amount from `tabSales Invoice` where company = %s and docstatus = 1 and posting_date = %s and pos_profile in %s order by creation",
                (comp, date, tuple(my_profiles)), as_dict=1)
            for s in csis:
                si_info[s.name] = {"customer": s.customer, "cash": 0.0,
                                   "credit": frappe.utils.flt(s.outstanding_amount),
                                   "modes": {}}
                order.append(s.name)
        for chd in children["Cash Sale"]:
            v = chd["voucher_no"]
            if v not in si_info:
                si_info[v] = {"customer": si_cust.get(v) or v, "cash": 0.0,
                              "credit": 0.0, "modes": {}}
                oq = frappe.db.sql(
                    "select customer, outstanding_amount from `tabSales Invoice` where name = %s",
                    (v,), as_dict=1)
                if oq:
                    si_info[v]["customer"] = oq[0].customer
                    si_info[v]["credit"] = frappe.utils.flt(oq[0].outstanding_amount)
                order.append(v)
            info = si_info[v]
            info["cash"] = info["cash"] + chd["amount"]

        if order:
            prs = frappe.db.sql(
                "select sip.parent as parent, sip.account as account, sip.amount as amount, sip.mode_of_payment as mop, a.account_type as atype from `tabSales Invoice Payment` sip join `tabAccount` a on a.name = sip.account where sip.parenttype = %s and sip.parent in %s",
                ("Sales Invoice", tuple(order)), as_dict=1)
            for prow in prs:
                amt = frappe.utils.flt(prow.amount)
                if amt <= 0:
                    continue
                if prow.account == acct:
                    continue
                if prow.atype == "Receivable":
                    continue
                info = si_info[prow.parent]
                modes = info["modes"]
                key = prow.mop or prow.account
                modes[key] = frappe.utils.flt(modes.get(key)) + amt

        mode_names = []
        for v in order:
            for k in si_info[v]["modes"]:
                if k not in mode_names:
                    mode_names.append(k)
        mode_names = sorted(mode_names)
        mode_fields = {}
        cols = []
        for cdef in cols_statement:
            cols.append(cdef)
            if cdef["fieldname"] == "cash_out":
                for k in mode_names:
                    f = "mop_" + k.lower().replace(" ", "_").replace("-", "_")
                    mode_fields[k] = f
                    cols.append({"label": k, "fieldname": f,
                                 "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 110})

        t_cash = 0.0
        t_credit = 0.0
        t_modes = {}
        for v in order:
            info = si_info[v]
            t_cash = t_cash + info["cash"]
            t_credit = t_credit + info["credit"]
            for k in info["modes"]:
                t_modes[k] = frappe.utils.flt(t_modes.get(k)) + info["modes"][k]

        rows.append({"particulars": "Brought forward (book, start of day)",
                     "cash_in": bf, "indent": 0, "bold_row": 1})
        sales_row = {"particulars": "+ Sales (bills at this counter)", "count": len(order),
                     "cash_in": t_cash, "credit": t_credit, "indent": 0}
        for k in t_modes:
            sales_row[mode_fields[k]] = t_modes[k]
        rows.append(sales_row)
        for v in order:
            info = si_info[v]
            child = {"particulars": info["customer"], "cash_in": info["cash"],
                     "credit": info["credit"], "ref_type": "Sales Invoice",
                     "reference": v, "indent": 1}
            for k in info["modes"]:
                child[mode_fields[k]] = info["modes"][k]
            rows.append(child)
        rows.append({"particulars": "+ Customer receipts (old dues)",
                     "count": len(children["Customer Receipt"]),
                     "cash_in": sums["Customer Receipt"], "indent": 0})
        for chd in children["Customer Receipt"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": pe_party.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"],
                         "cash_in": chd["amount"], "ref_type": "Payment Entry",
                         "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Transfer In"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "+ Transfers in (float received)",
                         "count": len(children["Transfer In"]),
                         "cash_in": sums["Transfer In"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Transfer In"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": (chd["remarks"] or je_remark.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"]).splitlines()[0][:70],
                             "cash_in": chd["amount"], "ref_type": "Journal Entry",
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Other Cash In"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "+ Other cash in",
                         "count": len(children["Other Cash In"]),
                         "cash_in": sums["Other Cash In"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Other Cash In"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": (chd["remarks"] or je_remark.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"]).splitlines()[0][:70],
                             "cash_in": chd["amount"], "ref_type": chd["voucher_type"],
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        rows.append({"particulars": "- Expenses", "count": len(children["Expense"]),
                     "cash_out": sums["Expense"], "indent": 0})
        for chd in children["Expense"]:
            lbl = chd["remarks"] or je_remark.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"]
            pos = lbl.find("expense (")
            if pos >= 0:
                lbl = lbl[pos + 8:]
            rows.append({"particulars": lbl.splitlines()[0][:70], "cash_out": chd["amount"],
                         "ref_type": chd["voucher_type"],
                         "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Party Payment"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "- Party payments",
                         "count": len(children["Party Payment"]),
                         "cash_out": sums["Party Payment"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Party Payment"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": pe_party.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"],
                             "cash_out": chd["amount"], "ref_type": "Payment Entry",
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Transfer Out"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "- Transfers out (handover / deposit)",
                         "count": len(children["Transfer Out"]),
                         "cash_out": sums["Transfer Out"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Transfer Out"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": (chd["remarks"] or je_remark.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"]).splitlines()[0][:70],
                             "cash_out": chd["amount"], "ref_type": "Journal Entry",
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Sale Return"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "- Sale returns / refunds",
                         "count": len(children["Sale Return"]),
                         "cash_out": sums["Sale Return"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Sale Return"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": si_cust.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"],
                             "cash_out": chd["amount"], "ref_type": "Sales Invoice",
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if sums["Other Cash Out"]:
            rows.append({"particulars": "- Other cash out",
                         "count": len(children["Other Cash Out"]),
                         "cash_out": sums["Other Cash Out"], "indent": 0})
            for chd in children["Other Cash Out"]:
                rows.append({"particulars": (chd["remarks"] or je_remark.get(chd["voucher_no"]) or chd["voucher_no"]).splitlines()[0][:70],
                             "cash_out": chd["amount"], "ref_type": chd["voucher_type"],
                             "reference": chd["voucher_no"], "indent": 1})
        if cuvs:
            tally = sums["Tally Adjustment"]
            rows.append({"particulars": "Tally adjustments (Cash Update Vouchers)",
                         "count": len(cuvs),
                         "cash_in": tally if tally > 0 else 0,
                         "cash_out": -tally if tally < 0 else 0,
                         "indent": 0})
            for c in cuvs:
                diff = frappe.utils.flt(c.difference)
                lbl = "counted %s vs book %s (%s)" % (
                    frappe.utils.flt(c.counted_total), frappe.utils.flt(c.book_balance),
                    c.variance_type or "Balanced")
                rows.append({"particulars": lbl,
                             "cash_in": diff if diff > 0 else 0,
                             "cash_out": -diff if diff < 0 else 0,
                             "ref_type": "Cash Update Voucher", "reference": c.name,
                             "indent": 1})
        rows.append({"particulars": "= Closing drawer balance (book, end of day)",
                     "cash_in": bal, "indent": 0, "bold_row": 1})
        un_total = 0.0
        for s in credit_unattributed:
            un_total = un_total + frappe.utils.flt(s.outstanding_amount)
        if credit_unattributed:
            rows.append({"particulars": "UNATTRIBUTED CREDIT (billed without POS profile)",
                         "count": len(credit_unattributed), "credit": un_total,
                         "indent": 0, "bold_row": 1})
            for s in credit_unattributed:
                rows.append({"particulars": "Credit: %s" % s.customer,
                             "credit": frappe.utils.flt(s.outstanding_amount),
                             "ref_type": "Sales Invoice", "reference": s.name,
                             "indent": 1})

data = [cols, rows, message, None, None, 1]

name: LedgerLift Follow-ups
report_script:
f = filters or {}
view = f.get("view") or "Detail"
conds = {"parenttype": "LedgerLift Tracker"}
if f.get("from_date") and f.get("to_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = ["between", [f.get("from_date"), f.get("to_date")]]
elif f.get("from_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = [">=", f.get("from_date")]
elif f.get("to_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = ["<=", f.get("to_date")]
if f.get("outcome"):
    conds["outcome"] = f.get("outcome")
if f.get("logged_by"):
    conds["logged_by"] = f.get("logged_by")

rows = frappe.get_all("LedgerLift Follow-up",
    filters=conds,
    fields=["follow_up_date", "outcome", "promised_amount", "promised_date",
            "next_follow_up_date", "logged_by", "notes", "parent"],
    order_by="follow_up_date desc, creation desc",
    limit_page_length=0)

parent_names = list(set([r.parent for r in rows]))
parents = {}
if parent_names:
    for d in frappe.get_all("LedgerLift Tracker",
            filters={"name": ["in", parent_names]},
            fields=["name", "customer", "outstanding_amount", "recovery_status",
                    "next_follow_up_date", "promised_amount", "promised_payment_date",
                    "last_contact_date"],
            limit_page_length=0):
        parents[d.name] = d

if f.get("customer"):
    rows = [r for r in rows if parents.get(r.parent) and parents[r.parent].customer == f.get("customer")]

if view == "By Customer":
    seen = {}
    counts = {}
    for r in rows:
        counts[r.parent] = counts.get(r.parent, 0) + 1
        if r.parent not in seen:
            seen[r.parent] = r
    result = []
    for pname, last in seen.items():
        p = parents.get(pname)
        if not p:
            continue
        result.append([p.customer, p.outstanding_amount, p.recovery_status,
                       last.follow_up_date, last.outcome, p.promised_amount,
                       p.promised_payment_date, p.next_follow_up_date,
                       counts.get(pname, 0), pname])
    result.sort(key=lambda x: (x[7] or "9999-12-31"))
    columns = [
        {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 190},
        {"label": "Outstanding", "fieldname": "outstanding_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 110},
        {"label": "Status", "fieldname": "recovery_status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 125},
        {"label": "Last Contact", "fieldname": "last_contact", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Last Outcome", "fieldname": "last_outcome", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 130},
        {"label": "Promised", "fieldname": "promised_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Promised Date", "fieldname": "promised_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Next Follow-up", "fieldname": "next_follow_up", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Logs", "fieldname": "log_count", "fieldtype": "Int", "width": 55},
        {"label": "Record", "fieldname": "record", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "LedgerLift Tracker", "width": 130},
    ]
else:
    result = []
    for r in rows:
        p = parents.get(r.parent)
        result.append([r.follow_up_date, p.customer if p else None, r.outcome,
                       r.promised_amount, r.promised_date, r.next_follow_up_date,
                       r.logged_by, r.notes, r.parent])
    columns = [
        {"label": "Date", "fieldname": "follow_up_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 95},
        {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 180},
        {"label": "Outcome", "fieldname": "outcome", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 140},
        {"label": "Promised", "fieldname": "promised_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Promised Date", "fieldname": "promised_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Next Follow-up", "fieldname": "next_follow_up_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 110},
        {"label": "Logged By", "fieldname": "logged_by", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "User", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Notes", "fieldname": "notes", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 300},
        {"label": "Record", "fieldname": "record", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "LedgerLift Tracker", "width": 130},
    ]
data = columns, result

name: LedgerLift Customer Ledger Summary
